name: Weaken Powder
components: V, S, M/DF (an empty paper cartridge)
description: Targeted firearm's ammunition halves the firearm's range and imposes a -2 penalty on damage rolls.

name: Weapon Of Awe
description: Weapon gets +2 on damage rolls.

name: Web
description: Fills 20-ft.-radius spread with sticky spiderwebs that can grapple foes and impair movement.

name: Web Bolt
description: You launch a ball of webbing at a target, which must make a save or be affected as if by a web spell occupying only the creature's space.

name: Web Cloud
effect: cloud spreads in 20-ft. radius, 20 ft. high
description: You create a cloud of flame-resistant strands of adhesive webbing that billows and flows much like a cloudkill spell.

name: Web Shelter
effect: 5 ft.–10 ft. diameter web sphere or 5 ft.–20 ft. hemisphere
description: Create a comfortable shelter made of webbing.

name: Weird
target: any number of creatures, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: As phantasmal killer, but affects all within 30 ft.

name: Whip Of Ants
description: Create a whip made of army ants.

name: Whip Of Centipedes
description: Create a whip made of poisonous centipedes.

name: Whip Of Spiders
components: V, S, M/DF (a square of red cloth)
description: Create a whip made of poisonous spiders.

name: Whirlwind
effect: cyclone 10 ft. wide at base, 30 ft. wide at top, and 30 ft. tall
description: Cyclone deals damage and can pick up creatures.

name: Whispering Lore
description: Upon casting this spell, you are able to gain knowledge from the land itself.

name: Whispering Wind
duration: no more than 1 hour/level or until discharged (destination is reached)
description: Sends a short message 1 mile/level.

name: Widen Auras
description: Increase the range of auras bestowed by your class.

name: Wilderness Soldiers
description: Nearby plants aid you in combat.

name: Wind Blades
description: You harden the air around the target into jagged invisible blades that deal damage based on how fast the target moves.

name: Wind Walk
target: you and one touched creature per three levels
description: You and your allies turn vaporous and travel fast.

name: Wind Wall
components: V, S, M/DF (a tiny fan and an exotic feather)
effect: wall up to 10 ft./level long and 5 ft./level high (S)
description: Deflects arrows, smaller creatures, gasses.

name: Winds Of Vengeance
description: Gives you the ability to fly and attack with wind.

name: Windy Escape
description: You respond to an attack by briefly becoming vaporous and insubstantial, allowing the attack to pass harmlessly through you.

name: Winter Feathers
description: The target's feathers thicken and fluff up to ward against winter's chill.

name: Wish
description: As limited wish, but with fewer limits.

name: Witness
description: See through the target's eyes and ears.

name: Wood Shape
target: one touched piece of wood no larger than 10 cu. ft. + 1 cu. ft./level
description: Reshapes wooden objects to suit you.

name: Wooden Phalanx
effect: three or more wood golems, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart (see text)
description: Creates 1d4+2 temporary wood golems to fight for you.

name: Word Of Chaos
area: nonchaotic creatures in a 40-ft.-radius spread centered on you
saving_throw: none or Will negates; see text
description: Kills, confuses, stuns, or deafens nonchaotic subjects.

name: Word Of Recall
target: you and touched objects or other willing creatures
description: Teleports you back to designated place.

name: Word Of Resolve
description: Ally rerolls a save against charm or fear.

name: World Wave
description: Earth moves you across distances.

name: Wrath
description: +1 attack and damage against target creature.

name: Wrathful Mantle
target: creature touched or all creatures within 5 ft.; see text
description: Subject shines and gets +1/four levels on all saves.

name: Wreath Of Blades
components: V, S, F (four mithral daggers, each worth at least 502 gp each)
description: Four mithral daggers speed around you, attacking nearby creatures and protecting your spellcasting from attacks of opportunity.

name: Youthful Appearance
description: Target appears younger.

name: Zone Of Silence
description: Keeps eavesdroppers from overhearing you.

name: Zone Of Truth
description: Subjects within range cannot lie.
